markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and optimize Marcel's calendar management and scheduling processes with Isabella (Bella).](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implement color-coded calendar system with specific blocks for deep work, client meetings, networking, and personal time](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Create separate "context" calendar for internal notes and meeting preparation details](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Prioritize clustering client meetings on Wednesdays/Thursdays, limit to 2 kickoffs per week](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Establish weekly calendar review process to maintain organization and prevent burnout](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

## Topics

### Calendar Organization Strategy

  - [Implement half-day clusters for different activities (e.g. client meetings, deep work)](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Designate 1-2 days per week (likely Tuesday/Friday) as protected "no meeting" days for creative work and thinking time](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Cluster in-person meetings when possible, prioritizing office days (tentatively Tuesday/Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Limit to 2 client kickoffs per week, ideally scheduled for 12pm or 1pm on Mondays](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Create color-coded system:](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
      - [Purple: Client kickoff calls](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
      - [Yellow: Prospecting/sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)
      - [Green: Deep work blocks](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
      - [Salmon: Networking](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
      - [Orange: Personal appointments](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
      - [Gray: Meetings to be rescheduled](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)

### Meeting Preparation Improvements

  - [Create separate "context" calendar for internal notes, meeting prep, and follow-up tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Include links to Attio profiles, meeting history, and relevant documents in context calendar](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Implement consistent labeling system (e.g. \[IN PERSON\], \[HOLD\], \[RESCHEDULE\])](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Assign team members (e.g. Kyle) to take over certain client accounts/meetings](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### Client Meeting Management

  - [Cluster existing client meetings and prospecting calls on Wednesdays/Thursdays when possible](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Aim to join every client meeting once per month, coordinating lighter weeks for full participation](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [For in-person meetings, prioritize hosting at the office and combine with lunch when possible](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### Administrative Support Needs

  - [Develop SOPs for different meeting types (sales calls, networking, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Create knowledge graph of contacts, including personal details and interaction history in Attio](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Implement follow-up system for meeting invites (3-4 day check-in, cancel if no response after a week)](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Ensure context and preparation materials are easily accessible before meetings](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize color-coding system and implement across calendar](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Create and share access to new "context" calendar](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Begin rescheduling meetings to align with new organization strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Develop SOPs for different meeting types and follow-up processes](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Improve Attio usage for contact management and meeting preparation](https://fathom.video/share/xgE2siRoFszMnKXU32o4ZG12ALrYNZBx?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
